sisnom/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
sisnom/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 bytecode, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 21-specific libraries or runtime expectations.

sisnom/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate servlet API dependency from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration.
sisnom/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ APIs. Using javax.servlet-api causes classpath conflicts and runtime failures (ClassNotFoundException) because the classes are no longer present in the jakarta namespace.

sisnom/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate servlet annotation imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet.annotation classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.servlet.annotation does not exist' errors.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate HttpServlet import from javax to jakarta namespace.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' errors.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate HttpServletRequest import from javax to jakarta namespace.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' errors.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate HttpServletResponse import from javax to jakarta namespace.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' errors.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.general_idea: Migrate HttpSession import from javax to jakarta namespace.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/LoginServle.why_exists: javax.servlet.http.HttpSession is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'cannot find symbol' errors.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/RegistroSer.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+.
sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/RegistroSer.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.

sisnom/src/main/java/servlet/RegistroSer.general_idea: Replace Math.random() with ThreadLocalRandom for better concurrency performance and modern API usage.
